Caption: Schematic illustration of the defect (a), ion diffusion types (b), and factors influencing ionic conductivity (c) in ISEs. Copyright 2017, Elsevier. Caption: Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) is a powerful technique for studying ion transport in inorganic solid electrolytes. By coupling NMR with Dynamic Nuclear Polarization (DNP), interfacial properties can also be effectively explored.
